title: PBIR Validator Undo Record
description: Backup written by fixer.apply_plan before any visual.json is mutated; consumed by undo.restore_last_fix to revert position.y to the pre-Apply value.

applied_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp the Apply ran. Informational only.

shifts.description: One entry per visual whose position.y was changed by Apply. Empty array is legal but no Undo button is enabled when the file is missing.

path.description: POSIX-style relative path from report root to the touched visual.json (forward slashes only, never backslashes).

visual_id.description: The visual's id field; redundant with path but cheap correlation aid for log readers.

old_y.description: Pre-Apply value of position.y. Restored by Undo.

new_y.description: Post-Apply value of position.y. Written for audit only; never read by Undo.
